observation: CFTC says two anonymous Mango accounts were funded with $5M USDC each before the matched MNGO-USDC swap positions
market_health_use: Fresh matched accounts with equal funding should be linked before their marks become borrowable collateral

observation: CFTC says one account opened a leveraged long and the other a matching short of more than 400M MNGO-USDC swaps at about $0.04
market_health_use: Large offsetting positions in a thin underlying can be wash-trade or self-trade risk when one side gets credit value

observation: Solidus Labs reconstructs a 483M MNGO-PERP buy at 18:25 EST
market_health_use: Perp open interest should be compared with underlying spot depth before profits are creditable

observation: CFTC says one oracle exchange saw more than 1M MNGO bought in about 30 minutes versus historical average volume of about 120000 MNGO per hour
market_health_use: Oracle-source volume shocks should quarantine dependent collateral marks

observation: CFTC says MNGO moved from about $0.04 to $0.45 on one oracle exchange and to about $0.13 and $0.91 on two others
market_health_use: Wide venue dispersion during concentrated buying should be treated as a manipulation-risk input

observation: CFTC says the Mango MNGO-USDC swap price rose from about $0.04 to about $0.54 during the incident window
market_health_use: Derivative marks tied to thin-token spot moves need delayed collateral eligibility

observation: CFTC says the long MNGO-USDC swap value rose from about $19M to more than $200M
market_health_use: Unrealized thin-market PnL should not immediately increase borrow limits at full value

observation: CFTC says the trader borrowed $114M in USDC USDT and other assets comprising all available lending liquidity
market_health_use: Cross-asset reserve depletion following one mark shock should trigger a platform-level pause

observation: SEC says approximately $116M was borrowed and withdrawn from Mango Markets effectively draining all available assets
market_health_use: Borrowout impact should be measured by platform liquidity lost not only attacker retained value

observation: DNI records funding at 10:19 PM UTC matched perp activity at 10:25 PM UTC external MNGO buying at 10:26 PM UTC and a $116M loan at 10:45 PM UTC
market_health_use: The short interval supports automated detection based on linked cross-module actions

observation: CFTC says MNGO quickly dropped to about $0.02 after the manipulation stopped
market_health_use: Post-event collapse confirms the mark was not durable enough to support full borrow value

observation: DNI reports approximately $67M was returned after the exploit
market_health_use: Recovery accounting should be separated from pre-loss surveillance controls
